title: froelichia nudicaulis subsp. curta
intro: Froelichia nudicaulis subsp. curta, also known as the Short Stickleaf, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Amaranthaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Froelichia nudicaulis subsp. curta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which is consumed to reap its medicinal benefits, although it's essential to consult a medical professional before using it as a treatment.
